_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: We determined neurofibroma methylation profiles using the Infinium MethylationEPIC array in a discovery cohort of 61 CNF and PNF samples... In total, we identified 31,201 significant differentially methylated probes (DMP; q < 0.05)
details: Successfully identified 31,201 significant differentially methylated probes (q < 0.05) between CNFs and PNFs, interrogating approximately 850,000 methylation sites throughout the genome
